items.title: The Beatles’ Long-Lost First-Ever ‘Top of the Pops’ Performance Has Been Found
items.summary: Footage of the 1964 appearance, where the Fab Four played "Can’t Buy Me Love" and "You Can’t Do That," was erased from BBC archives, but British conservationists obtained 35mm footage

items.title: Iron Maiden Enforce Phone-Free Standing Area at Paris La Défense Arena Show
items.summary: The rockers confirmed the La Défense Arena performance will be filmed for their forthcoming Run For Your Lives Tour concert film.

items.title: Goose Share Statement After Fan Falls To His Death
items.summary: Last night, as Connecticut rock band Goose played the second of two consecutive shows at Madison Square Garden, a 51-year-old man fell to his death. The man was transported to Bellevue Hospital, where he was later pronounced dead. The post Goose Share Statement After Fan Falls To His Death appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Katy Perry says she lost her “roar”, teases new material at Rock in Rio Lisbon 2026
items.summary: Katy Perry headlined Rock In Rio Lisbon last night (July 20), where she played her new song ‘Watch It Burn’ and also admitted that she “lost her roar” amid a torrid 2025. Wearing the same outfit that she sported during her Hello Katy Tour when she played Lisbon back in 2009, she told the crowd: […] The post Katy Perry says she lost her “roar”, teases new material at Rock in Rio Lisbon 2026 appeared first on NME.
